title: Make new endpoint /lang — Register /lang in API docs and ensure strict JSON-only responses
description:
## Overview

Once the `/lang` endpoint is functional (sub-tasks 01 and 02), this sub-task covers two housekeeping items:

1. **Register `/lang` in `API_ENDPOINTS`** inside `app.rb` so it appears in the `/api-docs` HTML page with correct method, path, description, and parameter documentation.
2. **Verify that all `/lang` responses are strictly JSON** — confirm there is no code path that could return HTML or plain text, and that error cases (wrong method, etc.) fall through to the existing 404 JSON handler.

## Reference

Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-25/make-new-endpoint-lang

## API_ENDPOINTS entry to add

```ruby
{
  method: 'GET',
  path: '/lang',
  description: 'List all supported languages and optionally return a localised welcome message',
  response: { languages: ['en', 'pl', 'de', 'fr'], selected_language: 'en', welcome: 'Welcome' },
  params: [
    { name: 'lang', type: 'query', required: false, description: 'Language code to select (defaults to en)' }
  ]
}
```

## Implementation notes

- No new behaviour — this sub-task is purely documentation and verification
- Confirm that `POST /lang`, `DELETE /lang`, etc. all return the existing 404 JSON response (no special handling needed)
- All response bodies from `GET /lang` must be parseable as JSON with no HTML fragments
scope: Document the /lang endpoint in API_ENDPOINTS and verify all its responses are JSON-only with no HTML leakage.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api-docs page lists the /lang endpoint with correct method, path, description, and lang param
API_ENDPOINTS constant contains an entry for GET /lang
POST /lang returns 404 JSON (falls through to the existing catch-all)
Every response from GET /lang has Content-Type: application/json
RSpec test or existing test suite passes without regression
relation_to_original: Satisfies the 'make responses in json' bullet point from the parent ticket and keeps the API docs in sync.
